name: Incognito Task — Intel

description: Hostile encampment overlook. Tag from the eastern ridge.

description: UNLRA research dossier — pinned under the wreckage at low tide.

description: South pad, closer to the motel, hot during peak hours.

description: Sandbagged combat outpost north of the airfield.
